description: Returns information about a common control in the AWS Control Catalog.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the common control.

CommonControlId.description: The unique identifier of the common control.

CreateTime.description: The time when the common control was created.

Description.description: The description of the common control.

Domain.description: The domain that the common control belongs to.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the related domain.

Name.description: The name of the related domain.

LastUpdateTime.description: The time when the common control was most recently updated.

Name.description: The name of the common control.

Objective.description: The objective that the common control belongs to.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the related objective.

Name.description: The name of the related objective.
